name: EuiRadioGroup
description: Group of mutually exclusive radio button options.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

compressed.description: Tightens up the spacing between radio rows

legend.type: HTMLAttributes<HTMLLegendElement> & CommonProps & { children: ReactNode; display?: "hidden" | "visible"; compressed?: boolean; }
legend.description:
Adds an EuiFormLegend element as the first child
If the individual labels for each radio do not provide a sufficient description, add a legend.
Wraps the group in a `EuiFormFieldset` which adds an `EuiLegend` for titling the whole group.
Accepts an `EuiFormLegendProps` shape.
